Title: Resume Audit
Description: A quick self-audit to identify gaps in your resume and prioritise the changes that will have the most impact.
SchemaJson: {"id":"resume_audit_v1","title":"Resume Audit","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"How recently did you update your resume?","options":["Within the last month","1–6 months ago","6–12 months ago","Over a year ago","I have never had a resume"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How confident are you that your current resume would pass an ATS scan?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"choice","label":"Which section of your resume do you feel is weakest?","options":["Summary or objective","Work experience bullets","Skills section","Education section","Layout and formatting"],"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"rating","label":"How well does your resume reflect your actual achievements and impact?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What is the single biggest challenge you face when writing or updating your resume?","required":false}]}
